text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Phew...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Crazy trainer. She should learn when to keep her mouth shut.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (People have always been such a pain. I can't stand any of them.)

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Your shoes? Oh yeah, I saw 'em! Up in that tree!

text_block_list.name: Boy B
text_block_list.text: But wait, you can't reach that high. Guess you've just gotta jump!

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text:
Poor Taishin, stuck sitting all by herself. Who wants to go try talking
to her?

text_block_list.name: Girl B
text_block_list.text: Ewww, not me! She's so weird! Let's rock-paper-scissors for it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Making fun of me and bullying me for the dumbest reasons. Like I'd ever wanna be friends with them.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Every single day was such a pain in the ass. But then... I found racing.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: It was the only good thing I had.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Aaaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text: Whoa, awesome!

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text: Hey, isn't that... Narita Taishin? That puny loner can run?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
So I lived to race. Because by winning, I could leave all the idiots
choking in the dust.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
If I could get away from them all, to the other side of the finish line...
I knew I'd finally be able to breathe easy.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
So I went full sprint ahead. I even imagined going for the Twinkle
Series. But...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Yes! I got first!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Pant, gasp. Crap!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, your name's Narita Taishin, isn't it? I heard you're going to
Tracen Academy in the spring. That true?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I don't see what it has to do with you.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: More like, what does it have to do with you? You know it's an elite school for runners with talent, right?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: What would they want a little runt like you for? You'll never get in!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to tell her to shut up, or that I'd show her, or a million other
things that came to mind.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: But even now, I can feel the words still stuck in my throat.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, gasp...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Damn... What the hell is going on? How can they be this much
better?! There's not an inch to squeeze through to the front!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (Tracen Academy... is no joke!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Gasp, gasp... Agh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (Can't breathe...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (I can't... catch my breath...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: No.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: No... I'm not letting it end here!

Long after the lights are out for the night, a small shadow crosses the
course. With a gulp, I go to confirm my suspicions.

Sure enough, it's her again—Narita Taishin— looking somewhat
distressed.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

She's clearly on the verge of collapsing. So without second thought, I
call out to her.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? Who the heck are you?
choice_data_list: You're going to get yourself injured.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Get lost. Why would I listen to you?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Uuugh! I said, beat it! I'm sick of you idiots!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
"Don't be reckless." "It's too dangerous." Well? Go ahead! I know
you're just itching to say it! "Racing isn't for you," right?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
"You're too short!" "You're too frail!" "You're not cut out to be a
racer!"

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: All that junk—I'm sick and tired of hearing it!

Seeing her intensity, I freeze, unsure how to respond. Bitterly, she
continues.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Okay?! I don't care what people say! I'm gonna stay right on the turf!
I'll show all you whiny morons!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'll show you exactly where I should be! And I'll be laughing when I
tell you to shove it from the winner's circle!
The look in her eyes is unmistakable.

It's the unquenchable thirst for victory—a terrible and unshakable
drive.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ah haaaaah! Found youuu, Taishiiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
What are you thinking, staying out this late?! All the lights are off! It's
dangerous!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh... What the heck are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
What else! I'm here to come get you! I was sooo worried waiting in the
dorm for you, Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I don't need you to worry about me.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh?! H-hey, wait up, Taishiiin!
The course goes quiet, leaving me alone with my thoughts.

The fire in her soul ignites something in me, and my pulse refuses to
slow down.
